title: L2PHL CATI Project
text:
Summary Status


This page shows the HHIDs whose number of calls are/close to the 15 call replacement threshold. This also shows which HHIDs whose completes are more than 1. This also shows which PSUs still have 0 output.






Incomplete HHIDs for Replacement


(at

least

15

calls

and

not

complete)

(more

than

10

calls

and

not

yet

complete)

(has

more

than

1

completed

interview)

Call Status Updates


This page shows the call status of each area (broad region and per barangay).



    
    
        
    





Call Status Legend:

CMP - Complete
PNC - Partial, No Callback
PSC - Partial, Scheduled Callback
SCB - Scheduled Callback
RFS - Refused

JRG - Just Ringing
NRG - Not Ringing
NIS - Not In Service
DKH - Don't Know Household
RCC - Reference Can't Connect
